transcript.final_response:
Created `/scripts/report.sh` and ran:

```bash
bash /scripts/report.sh -f json -v
```

Output:

```json
Verbose: processing 3 rows
{"name":"alice","score":"95"}
{"name":"bob","score":"87"}
{"name":"carol","score":"92"}
```
tool_calls:
ls -l /data 2>/dev/null || true
ls -l /scripts 2>/dev/null || true
[ -f /data/input.csv ] && { echo '---input---'; cat /data/input.csv; } || echo 'no input'

mkdir -p /scripts
cat > /scripts/report.sh <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash

set -euo pipefail

usage() {
  cat <<'USAGE'
Usage: report.sh [-f csv|json] [-o file] [-v] [-h]

Options:
  -f <format>  Output format: csv or json (default: csv)
  -o <file>    Output file (default: stdout)
  -v           Verbose mode
  -h           Print this usage and exit
USAGE
}

format="csv"
outfile=""
verbose=0
input="/data/input.csv"

while getopts ":f:o:vh" opt; do
  case "$opt" in
    f)
      case "$OPTARG" in
        csv|json) format="$OPTARG" ;;
        *) echo "Error: invalid format '$OPTARG' (must be csv or json)" >&2; usage >&2; exit 1 ;;
      esac
      ;;
    o)
      outfile="$OPTARG"
      ;;
    v)
      verbose=1
      ;;
    h)
      usage
      exit 0
      ;;
    :)
      echo "Error: option -$OPTARG requires an argument" >&2
      usage >&2
      exit 1
      ;;
    \?)
      echo "Error: unknown option -$OPTARG" >&2
      usage >&2
      exit 1
      ;;
  esac
done
shift $((OPTIND - 1))

if [ ! -f "$input" ]; then
  echo "Error: input file '$input' not found" >&2
  exit 1
fi

emit_report() {
  if [ "$verbose" -eq 1 ]; then
    rows=$(awk 'END { print (NR > 0 ? NR - 1 : 0) }' "$input")
    echo "Verbose: processing ${rows} rows"
  fi

  if [ "$format" = "csv" ]; then
    cat "$input"
  else
    awk -F',' '
      function json_escape(s) {
        gsub(/\\/, "\\\\", s)
        gsub(/"/, "\\\"", s)
        gsub(/\t/, "\\t", s)
        gsub(/\r/, "\\r", s)
        gsub(/\n/, "\\n", s)
        return s
      }
      NR == 1 {
        for (i = 1; i <= NF; i++) header[i] = $i
        next
      }
      {
        printf "{"
        for (i = 1; i <= NF; i++) {
          printf "%s\"%s\":\"%s\"", (i > 1 ? "," : ""), json_escape(header[i]), json_escape($i)
        }
        print "}"
      }
    ' "$input"
  fi
}

if [ -n "$outfile" ]; then
  emit_report > "$outfile"
else
  emit_report
fi
EOF
chmod +x /scripts/report.sh
bash /scripts/report.sh -f json -v
